title: strychnos rufa
intro: Strychnos rufa, also known as the Red Styrax or Red Storax, is a plant species that belongs to the Loganiaceae family and is native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating snake bites and as an antidote for strychnine poisoning. The health benefits of Strychnos rufa include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. Strychnos rufa can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
